mapper.select:
SELECT TBCI.ID "id", TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD "loadUnload", NVL(TBH.TON, 0) "handoverlistTon" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH ON TBCI.ID = TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBCI.ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBCI.ID "id", CASE WHEN TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS END + CASE WHEN TEMP3.WEIGHT_GOODS IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TEMP3.WEIGHT_GOODS END "weightGoods" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, SUM(VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港', '疏港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) TEMP2 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP2.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN(SELECT VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID, SUM(VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港', '疏港') GROUP BY VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID) TEMP3 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP3.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBCI.ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBCI.ID "id", CASE WHEN TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS END + CASE WHEN TEMP3.WEIGHT_GOODS IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TEMP3.WEIGHT_GOODS END "weightGoods" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, SUM(VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) TEMP2 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP2.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN(SELECT VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID, SUM(VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港') GROUP BY VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID) TEMP3 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP3.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBCI.ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBCI.ID "id", CASE WHEN TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS END + CASE WHEN TEMP3.WEIGHT_GOODS IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TEMP3.WEIGHT_GOODS END "weightGoods" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, SUM(VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ( '疏港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) TEMP2 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP2.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN(SELECT VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID, SUM(VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '疏港') GROUP BY VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID) TEMP3 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP3.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBCI.ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, VOYAGE, TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO
id = #{id}

SELECT (CASE WHEN TBCI.SHIP_NAME IS NOT NULL AND TDSI.VOYAGE IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TBCI.SHIP_NAME||'_'||TDSI.VOYAGE) ELSE '' END) SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TBT.TYPE TRUST_TYPE, TDS.BERTH_TIME, TBCI.ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCI.SCN, TBCI.SHIP_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_ID, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_CODE, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE, TBCI.PACKING_CODE, TBCI.PACKING_NAME, TBCI.COMPANY_ID, TBCI.COMPANY_NAME, TBCI.PARENT_ID, TBCI.ROOT_ID, TBCI.QUANTITY, TBCI.TON, TBCI.RIGHTS_QUANTITY, TBCI.SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, TBCI.IS_CLEAR, TBCI.CLEAR_BY, TBCI.CLEAR_BY_NAME, TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.CREATE_BY, TBCI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCI.CREATE_TIME, TBCI.UPDATE_BY, TBCI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCI.UPDATE_TIME, TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE, TBCI.TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TDS.ID = TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBT.ID = TBCI.TRUST_ID
TBCI.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CARGO_INFO( ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, SOURCE, TRUST_ID, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoAgentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rootId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{quantity, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{rightsQuantity, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{surplusRightsQuantity, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, '0', #{clearBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clearByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clearDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{source, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{residueStorage, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transferDate, jdbcType=DATE} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SET SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SCN = #{scn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_NAME = #{shipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{cargoOwnerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_OWNER_NAME = #{cargoOwnerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_AGENT_ID = #{cargoAgentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_AGENT_NAME = #{cargoAgentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PACKING_CODE = #{packingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PACKING_NAME = #{packingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ROOT_ID = #{rootId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TON = #{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, RIGHTS_QUANTITY = #{rightsQuantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY = #{surplusRightsQuantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, IS_CLEAR = #{isClear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLEAR_BY = #{clearBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CLEAR_BY_NAME = #{clearByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLEAR_DATE = #{clearDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SET IS_PRE_PAY = #{isPrePay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SET SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY = #{surplusRightsQuantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SET IS_CLEAR = '1', CLEAR_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CLEAR_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLEAR_DATE = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REAL_CLEAR_DATE = #{realClearDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT STOREHOUSE_ID "storehouseId", REGION_ID "regionId", MASS_ID "massId" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY STOREHOUSE_ID, REGION_ID, MASS_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO_COILNUM WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND BUSINESS_TYPE = #{businessType}

SELECT ID, NUM, CARGO_INFO_ID, COIL_NUM, TON, COIL_SIZE1, COIL_SIZE2, STATUS, RECEIVE_ADDRESS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, WARE_HOUSING_BY, WARE_HOUSING_BY_NAME, WARE_HOUSING_TIME, OUT_BOUND_BY, OUT_BOUND_BY_NAME, OUT_BOUND_TIME FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO_COILNUM WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND BUSINESS_TYPE = #{businessType} ORDER BY NUM

SELECT MSY.ID, MSY.PARENT_ID, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_NM, MSY.SHORT_CD, MSY.AREA, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD, MSY.IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD, MSY.UNIT_AREA_TON, MSY.IS_RENT, MSY.WORK_AREA_CD, MSY.SORT_NUM, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, MSY.CREATE_BY, MSY.CREATE_BY_NAME, MSY.CREATE_TIME, MSY.UPDATE_BY, MSY.UPDATE_BY_NAME, MSY.UPDATE_TIME, MSY.BHT_ID, REGEXP_REPLACE(RTRIM(XMLCAST(XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT(E, TBCI.IS_CLEAR || ',') ORDER BY TBCI.IS_CLEAR) AS CLOB), ','), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1') "IS_CLEARS" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD MSY ON TPPSD.MASS_ID = MSY.ID JOIN T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD2 ON MSY.ID = TPPSD2.MASS_ID JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TPPSD2.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID WHERE TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY MSY.ID, MSY.PARENT_ID, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_NM, MSY.SHORT_CD, MSY.AREA, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD, MSY.IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD, MSY.UNIT_AREA_TON, MSY.IS_RENT, MSY.WORK_AREA_CD, MSY.SORT_NUM, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, MSY.CREATE_BY, MSY.CREATE_BY_NAME, MSY.CREATE_TIME, MSY.UPDATE_BY, MSY.UPDATE_BY_NAME, MSY.UPDATE_TIME, MSY.BHT_ID

SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, CONTRACT_ID, RATE, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, AMOUNT, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_BY_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, IS_USE_REDUCE, IS_FINAL, REDUCE_AMOUNT FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE WHERE IS_FINAL = '1' AND CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SET IS_CLEAR = '0', CLEAR_BY = NULL, CLEAR_BY_NAME = NULL, CLEAR_DATE = NULL, REAL_CLEAR_DATE = NULL WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION SET DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE STACK_ID IN
#{stackId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipVoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBCI.ID,TBCI.CARGO_NAME,TBCI.IS_CLEAR,CARGO_INFO_NO||'-'||TBCI.CARGO_NAME||'-' ||DECODE(TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID,NULL,'',TBCI.SHIP_NAME||'_'||TDSI.VOYAGE||'-') ||TBCI.TRADE_TYPE CARGO_INFO_NAME FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBCI.IS_CLEAR = '0' AND TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} OR TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID IS NULL)
SELECT * FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO_COILNUM WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND BUSINESS_TYPE = #{businessType}
SELECT * FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO_COILNUM WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND BUSINESS_TYPE = #{businessType}

SELECT TBTC.ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on TBCI.ID = TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID WHERE TBT.TYPE IN ('集港','拆箱集港','疏港','陆销') AND TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID LEFT JOIN WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WPP ON TBTC.BUSINESS_NO = WPP.PLAN_NO WHERE TBT.TYPE IN ('集港','拆箱集港','疏港','陆销') AND TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId}
SELECT REAL_CLEAR_DATE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ID =#{cargoInfoId}

SELECT DISTINCT tbr.RATE_CODE_EAS "rateCodeEas" , TBR.RATE_NAME_EAS "rateNameEas", TBCI.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", TBCI.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", MCC.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE "cargoCategoryCode", MCC.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME "cargoCategoryName", CASE WHEN mc.WORK_TYPE = '1' THEN '件杂' WHEN mc.WORK_TYPE = '1' THEN '散杂' END "packing" FROM T_BUS_RATE tbr LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON TBCI.CARGO_CODE = TBR.CARGO_CODE LEFT JOIN M_CARGO MC ON MC.CARGO_CODE = TBCI.CARGO_CODE LEFT JOIN M_CARGO_CATEGORY mcc ON MC.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = MCC.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE TBCI.ID= #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO_COILNUM WHERE ID IN
#{dto.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

DELETE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO_COILNUM WHERE ID IN
#{dto.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SET IS_LOGOUT = #{isLogout,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_SETTLE_STORAGE = #{isSettleStorage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOGOUT_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, LOGOUT_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOGOUT_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
